name: Ptolemy
description:
Ptolemy is a soldier of Iskandar's army. He is a Non-classed Servant summoned by Iskandar's Noble Phantasm Ionioi Hetairoi. Like all of his fellow comrades in Ionioi Hetairoi, he is unquestionably loyal to Iskander and always supports his cause.

While this younger version embodies his youth as a soldier under Alexander the Great, his older version embodies him as an old man and the ruler of Egypt.
